title: Set the default ulimits to match Docker
body:
We want to set the maximum number of processes and number of open files
to match the Docker defaults.

nofile=1048576:1048576, nproc=1048576:1048576

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:
What's the rationale setting just these two defaults?  Your testing out-of-band also saw a difference in the limit for queued signals.
Can we update the docs to list the correct syntax for the argument values?  Can we add tests for this?
When invoked by an unprivileged user, this appears to trigger an EPERM when it attempts to raise hard limits.
Yes I was thinking of this causing issues. I guess we should set it to the Hardlimit for the user.
